title: Stride Asset Store - Registry Entry
description: A registry entry. Lives at AssetContainer/registry/<id>.json. This is what a PR adds.

id.description: Must match the file name (<id>.json) and AssetData/manifest.json#id.

repo.description: URL of the public git repository hosting AssetData/.

submittedBy.description: GitHub account that submitted the entry.

latest.description: The 'open' version: points at a branch/tag, resolved to an immutable commit by the bot.

ref.description: Tracked branch or tag, e.g. main or v1.2.0.

certified.description: Versions stamped as quality-approved by the Stride team. Editable only by CODEOWNERS.

tag.description: Human-readable alias of the certified commit.
